paymentTermsDefault:
10% Deposit upon acceptance of quote. 80% once work has commenced. 10% upon completion.
All payments to be made in accordance with the Building and Construction Industry Security of Payment Act 1999.
legalNotesDefault:
Backyard Splashes does not take any responsibility for any work carried out without the approval of local councils. Under the NSW pool legislation owners of a SwimSpa/Spa are RESPONSIBLE for ensuring safety is always carried out. This means that it is YOUR RESPONSIBILITY to make sure the hardcover for your SwimSpa/Spa is ALWAYS LOCKED WHEN NOT IN USE.

The Customer hereby acknowledges their responsibilities as outlined in the "Terms and Conditions" and "Terms of Payment".
